title: Ascend E-commerce Platform
description: A full-stack e-commerce platform featuring a modern design, tailored for a seamless shopping experience. Includes robust features like Payment Gateway integration, Google OAuth 2.0, and secure password recovery via email links.

title: SupportBotAI
description: An AI-powered support bot that automates customer assistance and improves ticket resolution efficiency.

title: Moodify: AI Emotion-Based Music Player
description: A MERN stack application that leverages real-time facial expression analysis to curate music matching your emotional state.

title: ZenTask Productivity Dashboard
description: A comprehensive productivity dashboard integrating a Pomodoro timer, daily planner, and dynamic themes.

title: Inventory Management System
description: A Django application offering a solution for managing business operations with an emphasis on modern web technologies.

title: Snake Game
description: A retro-style Snake Game built from scratch focusing on fundamental game logic, collision detection, and canvas rendering.

title: Kanban Board
description: A sleek Kanban board to manage tasks efficiently, featuring drag-and-drop functionality and local storage persistence.

title: Image Editor
description: A web-based image manipulation tool to apply filters, crop, rotate, and adjust lighting on the fly.

title: Snitch Ecommerce
description: A full-stack e-commerce project in active development, featuring robust backend architecture, responsive product grids, and complete shopping cart state handling.

title: CleanPro Landing Page
description: A modern and engaging landing page for 'CleanPro,' a service dedicated to advanced wardrobe care.

title: BEIGES Sweaters Landing Page
description: A minimalist and elegant landing page for a fashion brand incorporating artistic image collages and absolute positioning.

title: Figma Style Design Tool
description: A web-based design tool interface mimicking Figma's aesthetic, built for quick prototyping.

title: Alvy Static Page
description: A visually appealing static site architecture developed precisely using SCSS.

title: Dribbble Landing Page
description: A polished landing page replicating popular Dribbble UI patterns.

title: Ape Landing Page
description: An aesthetic landing page with custom CSS styling and modern typography.

title: Nothing Clone Website
description: A clone of the 'Nothing' tech brand's website utilizing advanced UI elements and clean minimalism.
